item.title: CV - Mehul Irá
item.description: Curriculum Vitae Personal information Full name: Mehul Sasikante Irá E-mail: mehulira@protonmail.com Work Experience Mindera Software Engineer. Since August 2015. Currently here. Contributed into many projects of Mindera clients and/or tech partners in the following business sectors: Retail, Gambling and SaaS products. Technologies used while working here: Go, Java, Kotlin, Vert.x, Spring / Spring Boot, PostgreSQL and MySQL. Portugal Telecom (now Altice Portugal) Software Developer. From September 2012 to August 2015.

item.title: Digging into Goroutines I
item.description: Go enables writing programs with concurrent threads of execution. And it does so by introducing the concept of goroutine. A goroutine has a simple model: it is a function executing concurrently with other goroutines in the same address space. in Effective Go Before digging into goroutines, having an understanding on “how” the Go compiler and runtime work together in order to launch a goroutine will pave the path to its internals.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Mehul Irá, Software Developer. Currently working at Mindera, was previously at: SAPO/Portugal Telecom (now Altice Portugal), 2012-2015; URBANOS, 2012; BOLD Int, 2012-2015; and agap2, 2010-2012. You can also find me at: https://github.com/hiddenbyte https://twitter.com/hiddenbyte https://www.linkedin.com/in/mehulira About hiddenbyte.log Most of the log entries will be about Software Development.
